since_last: 17% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 17% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.31% · Gold -0.84% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 17% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.29%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.29%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at -8.30%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.30%, SAP +3.20%, SPCX +1.56%, NOW +1.48%, INTU +1.06%. Laggards: MRVL -8.30%, MU -7.64%, ASML -7.48%, INTC -7.10%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.56% at $157.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
